segments.integrated_caption: Kendall Jenner enters a bright, stylishly decorated room with wooden floors and bookshelves, smiling as she greets the audience, stating, "Hey Vogue, I'm Kendall Jenner and this is what I wear in a week." Upbeat, light pop music begins to play softly as the scene transitions to a title card showcasing '7 Days, 7 Looks with Kendall Jenner' and five different outfits. The focus then shifts to Monday’s look, which Kendall describes as her "everyday kind of running errands, running around town look." She is seen wearing a simple, fitted black tee, which she identifies as "a little black tee by Sunday's Best." Her high-waisted black jeans, which she states are from 'Kate' (Khaite) and are "probably my most favorite jeans ever" for their "best fit and super long" length, are highlighted through alternating full-body and close-up shots. She specifically notes their "perfect high waist, mid-waist spot." Draped over her shoulders is a vibrant red sleeveless sweater, also from 'Kate' (Khaite), which she loves for its "pop of red" and as a practical layering piece to "warm myself back up." She completes the ensemble with brown loafers, identifying them as from 'The Row' and describing them as "really pretty like brown with like almost like a hint of red in them," expressing her affection for them. Throughout, Kendall maintains a confident, relaxed demeanor, gesturing expressively as she speaks directly to the camera in the consistent, naturally lit room.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with Kendall Jenner entering a bright, stylishly decorated room with wooden floors, bookshelves, and a clothing rack. She greets the audience with a smile, introducing herself and the theme: '7 Days, 7 Looks with Kendall Jenner.' The scene transitions to a title card showcasing five different outfits, followed by a focus on Monday’s look. Kendall appears in a black tee by Sunday Best, paired with high-waisted black jeans she describes as her 'most favorite ever' for their perfect fit and length. She wears a sleeveless red sweater draped over her shoulders, which she notes is from Khaite and serves as a versatile layer. She highlights the jeans’ high waist and long length, ideal for her tall frame, and mentions her love for the comfort and style of her brown loafers. The camera alternates between full-body shots and close-ups, emphasizing the outfit’s details and her confident, relaxed demeanor as she gestures and speaks directly to the camera. The room remains consistent throughout, with natural light and tasteful decor enhancing the fashion-focused atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The video begins with a close-up of brown loafers on a wooden floor, accompanied by text stating 'I love these loafers, they're actually super comfortable.' Kendall Jenner's voice confirms, "they're actually super comfortable. I feel like I can wear them everywhere." The scene then transitions to Kendall in a bright, stylish room, wearing a Sunday Best black tee, high-waisted black jeans, and a Khaite sleeveless red sweater draped over her shoulders, paired with the brown loafers. She walks confidently, adjusting her vintage Gucci sunglasses, and states, "I don't ever leave the house or a hotel without a pair of sunglasses. I just feel safe behind them or something... These are vintage, they're Gucci. Love these guys." She then picks up a brand new Bottega bag, describing it as "the perfect size for anything and everything," adding, "Love him." On-screen labels highlight her outfit: 'Layers,' 'Big Bag,' 'Baby Tee,' 'Fav Jeans,' 'Loafers,' and 'Vintage Sunglasses.' A light, jazzy instrumental track begins as the scene shifts to a new look for 'Tuesday.' Kendall, now in a vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress and black Gucci boots, holding a small clutch, explains, "this is what I'm calling my Fashion Week look... I am wearing a vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress, which I love, it's very comfortable and stretchy... so I can get in and out of buildings, in and out of cars, go to shoots and shows and feel really comfortable and not feel like I'm really constrained. I actually feel really good in this dress." Close-ups show the black Gucci boots, which she identifies as "vintage Gucci boots, they're just a good find," as she walks, emphasizing their comfort and suitability for the week ahead.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with Kendall Jenner, dressed in a form-fitting beige vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress, black Gucci boots, and carrying a bag, confidently walking a city sidewalk as photographers capture her. She then transitions to a bright, stylish room to present her outfit, speaking clearly and enthusiastically. She highlights her black Gucci boots, which she loves and wears "all the time," before presenting a structured black quilted bag, which she refers to as "This The Row bag," describing it as a "good basic" she's "obsessed with." She then showcases vintage Gucci sunglasses, emphasizing they are a daily staple she wears "every single day." Kendall describes this ensemble as her "vibe" for Milan Fashion Week, envisioning herself as "a little Italian designer in Italy." After a brief transition marked by movement sounds, a laugh at 0:31, and a sigh at 0:33, she presents a new outfit for Wednesday, consisting of a white t-shirt and blue jeans. She describes this simple, comfortable look as her "going to work, going to set, going to a meeting look" and her everyday "uniform." She then adds a beige The Row coat, which she considers a "special" piece she likes to "throw on." The room's natural lighting and curated aesthetic remain consistent, underscoring her fashion-forward yet practical approach.

segments.integrated_caption: Kendall Jenner stands in a bright, stylish room with wooden floors and bookshelves, presenting a casual yet polished outfit. She begins by putting on a beige The Row coat, which she enthusiastically describes as 'shocker, it's all I wear,' and 'a good classic trench' that she's 'absolutely obsessed with' and can wear in the spring. Beneath the coat, she wears a white t-shirt, which she identifies as a 'Sunday Best tee,' noting its stretchy, thick fabric. She then highlights her blue jeans, stating they are from Khaite and are 'the exact black jean' style she wore earlier, praising them as the 'best fit ever' and expressing she 'will never get sick of these jeans.' Next, she showcases her black boots, also from The Row, calling them her 'ultimate favorite' and a 'take on a riding boot.' As a self-proclaimed 'horse girl,' she expresses a deep connection to them, smiling as she says she feels like she 'would be' this boot. Finally, she turns to a full-length mirror to put on vintage Gucci sunglasses, explaining she 'can't leave the house or the hotel without 'em' and that she owns 'a lot of vintage Gucci sunglasses,' reinforcing her love for the brand. On-screen text like 'That's all I wear' and 'I have a lot of vintage Gucci sunglasses' appears, complementing her commentary in the warm, curated room.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with Kendall Jenner, still in her polished 'Meeting Look' of a beige The Row coat, white t-shirt, blue jeans, and black boots, adding a black shoulder bag. She describes the bag as "The Row," a "really good bag to add a pop of color," and reflects on the previous outfit's purpose for "doing business" and "cracking big deals." A transition sound then signals a shift as Kendall changes into her 'Airport Look' for Thursday. She now confidently walks through the bright, stylish room, wearing a distressed black leather jacket, a vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, and a black New York Yankees cap worn backward, accessorized with black pointed-toe boots and a black shoulder bag. Kendall explains her travel strategy, stating she loves to be comfortable on a plane and doesn't wear these jeans in-flight, instead carrying leggings in her carry-on to change into after security. She identifies her distressed black leather jacket as a "Ralph Lauren jacket from 2018" and her jeans as "Levi 501s," which she believes were "men's" and "huge on me when I got" them, emphasizing the vintage tee as well. The video uses split-screen to highlight details of her cap and jacket as she shares her practical yet stylish travel tips.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video transitions from a polished, professional look to a more casual, travel-ready ensemble. Kendall Jenner, previously seen in a beige The Row coat, white t-shirt, blue jeans, and black boots, now shifts into a relaxed 'Airport Look' for Thursday. She changes into a distressed black leather jacket with a vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, and a black New York Yankees cap. She accessorizes with a black shoulder bag and black pointed-toe boots, emphasizing comfort and style for travel. On-screen text highlights her travel strategy: carrying leggings for in-flight comfort and changing into them after security. The setting remains the same bright, stylish room with bookshelves, clothing racks, and decorative elements, but the mood shifts to a more laid-back, practical vibe. The video uses split-screen to show close-ups of the cap and jacket details, while Kendall walks confidently, explaining her outfit choices and travel tips.

segments.integrated_caption: The video segment begins with Kendall Jenner in a bright, stylish room, showcasing her 'Airport Look.' She wears a distressed black leather jacket over a vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, black pointed-toe boots, and a black New York Yankees cap worn backward. Speaking in a clear, conversational tone, Kendall explains she tailored her 'Levi's 501s' to fit, noting she often needs men's jeans for sufficient length. She highlights her 'Row boots,' describing them as 'a bit high,' going 'up to the knee,' with a 'small little heel' for comfort. On-screen text labels the outfit components: 'Good Leather Jacket,' 'Vintage Tee,' 'Worn Jeans,' and 'Boots.' Kendall then adjusts her jacket, stating she'd wear it 'zipped up,' and the distinct sound of a zipper pulling up is heard as she zips it. Checking her reflection, she adds 'sunglasses' for a final touch, accompanied by rustling sounds, declaring, 'This is me. To the airport, I go.' Faint background music plays throughout. A 'FRIDAY' title card transitions the scene, and Kendall reappears in a new 'Vacation Look,' which she introduces as 'my vacation look.' She wears a white Bode shirt over a black bra top, paired with black flowy pants and sandals, describing the pants as 'Row slouchy flowy pants' and emphasizing their 'super comfortable' feel. On-screen text labels this as 'Vacation Look.'

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a bright, stylish room with a woman showcasing her 'Vacation Look,' consisting of a white Bode shirt worn open over a black bra top, black flowy pants, and sandals. She adjusts her shirt, which she describes as 'so pretty,' and turns to display the outfit. Moving to a bookshelf, she picks up a large, vibrant yellow tote bag, which she calls a 'Bode bag' and a 'big sack bag.' She expresses her deep affection for the bag, explaining it was a personalized birthday gift. She details its whimsical designs, revealing that 'Arizona' is her dog's name, 'Kung Fu Kenny' is her nickname, and other elements represent her car and favorite places, making it 'a lot of me.' She highlights its practicality for beach trips, holding books, and sunscreen, noting its 'very big' and 'perfect size for vacation.' After slinging the bag over her shoulder and putting on vintage Gucci sunglasses, she smiles and gestures, summarizing the ensemble as her 'vacation vibe.' A 'SATURDAY' title card transitions the scene, and she reappears in a completely different 'Night Out Look': a sleek black leather mini dress, sheer black tights, and red pointed-toe heels, whose distinct clicking sounds are audible as she strikes a pose. She begins to introduce this new outfit, saying, 'So, this is my...' before the minute concludes. The warm, curated room, with its clothing rack, bookshelves, mirror, and floral arrangement, remains consistent throughout.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment begins with a woman in a bright, stylish room, wearing a white Bode shirt open over a black bra top, paired with black flowy pants and sandals, embodying a relaxed 'Vacation Look'. She adjusts her shirt, then turns to showcase the outfit from different angles. She walks toward a bookshelf, picks up a large, vibrant yellow tote bag adorned with personal and whimsical designs—including a Jeep, a Scorpio constellation, a cowboy boot labeled 'Kung Fu Kenny', and a patch reading 'Sedona Red Rock'—and slings it over her shoulder. She expresses her love for the bag, revealing it was a birthday gift and personalized with her dog’s name, 'Arizona'. She also mentions it’s perfect for beach trips, holding books and her phone. She puts on vintage Gucci sunglasses, smiles, and gestures to the camera, summarizing the look as her 'vacation vibe'. The scene transitions with a 'SATURDAY' title card, and she reappears in a completely different outfit: a sleek black leather mini dress, sheer black tights, and red pointed-toe heels, striking a pose with arms outstretched, introducing her 'Night Out Look'. The room remains consistent throughout, with a clothing rack, bookshelves, a mirror, and a floral arrangement visible, maintaining a warm, curated aesthetic.

active_entities.White Bode shirt: A white, long-sleeved, relaxed-fit shirt worn open over a black bra top, featuring subtle black stitching details along the front placket.
active_entities.Black bra top: A simple, form-fitting black top worn as a base layer under the white Bode shirt, visible at the neckline and midriff.
active_entities.Black flowy pants: Loose, wide-leg black pants with a slouchy, comfortable fit, paired with flat sandals for a casual vacation aesthetic.
active_entities.Sandals: Simple, flat black sandals with a minimal strap design, worn for comfort and ease during the 'Vacation Look'.
active_entities.Vintage Gucci sunglasses: Dark, classic cat-eye sunglasses worn to complete the 'Vacation Look', adding a touch of vintage glamour.
active_entities.Vacation Look: On-screen text labeling the outfit as a relaxed, comfortable ensemble ideal for travel and leisure, featuring the white Bode shirt, black bra top, black flowy pants, sandals, and custom bag.

audio_updated_entities.White Bode shirt: A white, long-sleeved, relaxed-fit shirt, described by the speaker as a 'Bode shirt' that she loves and finds 'so pretty,' worn open over a black bra top, featuring subtle black stitching details along the front placket.
audio_updated_entities.Black bra top: A simple, form-fitting black top, referred to by the speaker as 'a little bra top,' worn as a base layer under the white Bode shirt, visible at the neckline and midriff.
audio_updated_entities.Vacation Look: On-screen text labeling the outfit as a relaxed, comfortable ensemble ideal for travel and leisure, which the speaker describes as her 'vacation vibe,' featuring the white Bode shirt, black bra top, black flowy pants, sandals, and custom bag.
audio_updated_entities.Custom Bag: A large, bright yellow tote bag, referred to by the speaker as a 'Bode bag' and a 'big sack bag,' which she received as a birthday gift. She expresses her love for its personalized, eclectic design, explaining that the 'Arizona' inscription is her dog's name, 'Kung Fu Kenny' is what her friends call her, and other designs represent her car and favorite places. She highlights its practicality for vacation, beach trips, and holding items like books and sunscreen, noting its 'very big' and 'perfect size for vacation.'
audio_updated_entities.Red pointed-toe heels: Elegant, high-heeled shoes with a pointed toe and red patent finish, adding a pop of color and glamour to the 'Night Out Look,' with their distinct clicking sound audible as the speaker moves.
audio_updated_entities.Night Out Look: On-screen text introducing the new outfit segment, featuring the black leather mini dress, sheer tights, and red heels, designed for evening events, which the speaker begins to introduce as 'my...' before the segment ends.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a 'Night Out Look' title card, transitioning to Kendall Jenner in a bright, stylish room. She wears a form-fitting black leather mini dress with a V-neckline, sheer black tights, and red pointed-toe heels. Kendall speaks, explaining her preference for comfort while still feeling "cute and sexy" for a night out, emphasizing her love for the dress's "form-fitting" nature and "snatched waist." She reveals the entire ensemble, from "ears to toes," is Bottega, explicitly naming the "Bottega earrings, Bottega dress, Bottega shoes," and expressing her admiration for Bottega as one of her favorite Italian designers. She recalls wearing a "pastel yellow" version of the dress to the US Open last year, contrasting it with the current "black silky one," and reiterates her satisfaction with its "super form-fitting and cute" design. On-screen text reinforces her commentary, including 'I love to be really comfortable when I go out,' 'Bottega dress, Bottega shoes,' and 'I got this whole look on Fwrd,' as she mentions her connection to Fwrd. She then picks up a small, structured red Bottega bag with gold hardware, noting her preference for "smaller, small-ish bag[s]" for evenings out and highlighting how it perfectly "matches my shoes." The camera alternates between full-body shots, close-ups of her legs and shoes, and mirror reflections, capturing her expressive gestures and the outfit's luxurious details under soft, natural lighting. The segment concludes with Kendall holding the red bag, smiling, and looking pleased with the complete look.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment opens with a title card introducing the 'Night Out Look,' transitioning into a full shot of Kendall Jenner standing in a bright, stylish room with bookshelves, a clothing rack, and a full-length mirror. She is wearing a form-fitting black leather mini dress with a V-neckline, sheer black tights, and red pointed-toe heels. She gestures expressively as she speaks, emphasizing her comfort and confidence in the outfit, describing it as 'cute and sexy.' She highlights the dress’s perfect fit and mentions her love for Bottega Veneta, noting she owns the dress, earrings, and shoes from the brand. She shares that she wore a similar version to the US Open the previous year and praises the brand’s consistent quality. She then picks up a small, structured red bag with gold hardware, explaining it’s a great match for the Bottega look and ideal for a night out. The camera alternates between full-body shots, close-ups of her legs and shoes, and mirror reflections, capturing her movements and the outfit’s details. The lighting remains soft and natural, enhancing the luxurious feel of the scene. On-screen text reinforces her commentary, including phrases like 'I love to be really comfortable when I go out,' 'Bottega dress, Bottega shoes,' and 'I got this whole look on Fwrd.' The segment ends with her holding the red bag, smiling, and looking satisfied with the complete ensemble.

active_entities.Black leather mini dress: A form-fitting, sleeveless black leather dress with a V-neckline, worn with sheer black tights and red heels, described as comfortable, sexy, and perfectly fitting.
active_entities.Sheer black tights: Opaque black tights with a sheer texture, worn under the black leather mini dress to add sophistication and coverage, noted for their seamless fit.
active_entities.Red pointed-toe heels: Elegant, high-heeled shoes with a pointed toe and red patent finish, adding a pop of color and glamour to the 'Night Out Look', described as a favorite for going out.
active_entities.Bottega bag: A small, structured red bag with gold hardware, held by Kendall as a perfect accessory to match the Bottega look, described as ideal for a night out.
active_entities.Night Out Look: On-screen text introducing the outfit segment, featuring the black leather mini dress, sheer tights, red heels, and Bottega accessories, designed for evening events.

audio_updated_entities.Black leather mini dress: A form-fitting, sleeveless black leather dress with a V-neckline, worn with sheer black tights and red heels. Kendall describes it as 'cute and sexy,' 'form-fitting,' and having a 'snatched waist,' noting she loves its fit. She refers to it as a 'black silky one' and mentions wearing a 'pastel yellow' version to the US Open last year.
audio_updated_entities.Red pointed-toe heels: Elegant, high-heeled shoes with a pointed toe and red patent finish, adding a pop of color and glamour. Kendall confirms these are 'Bottega shoes' and that the red Bottega bag 'matches my shoes.'
audio_updated_entities.Bottega bag: A small, structured red bag with gold hardware, held by Kendall. She describes it as a 'smaller, small-ish bag' ideal for a night out, confirming it 'matches my shoes' and is 'also Bottega.'
audio_updated_entities.Night Out Look: On-screen text introducing the outfit segment. Kendall introduces it as a 'Night out look, birthday party look, whatever you want to call it,' emphasizing her desire for comfort while feeling 'cute and sexy.'
audio_updated_entities.Bottega earrings: Gold, chunky hoop earrings worn with the black leather mini dress. Kendall explicitly names them as 'Bottega earrings' and part of her 'all Bottega' ensemble.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with Kendall Jenner showcasing a sleek, form-fitting black leather mini dress, paired with sheer black tights and red pointed-toe heels, while holding a vibrant red Bottega bag. She stands in a bright, stylish room, introducing the outfit by stating, "I feel like this is the vibe." She elaborates that this is "most likely what I would wear on a night out, to a birthday party, or a friend's dinner," emphasizing, "I feel very comfortable and I love it." On-screen text labels the key pieces: 'Little Black Dress,' 'Semi Sheers,' 'Fun Bag,' and 'Croc Mules,' all set to light, upbeat instrumental music. The scene transitions with a 'SUNDAY' title card, accompanied by sounds of rustling fabric. Kendall then changes into a black workout bodysuit with white socks and white sneakers, announcing, "this is my workout day." She explains this is "probably what you'll find me in most days of the week," as she gets up "pretty early every morning" for Pilates, identifying her white sneakers as "Sambas" worn instead of a "proper gym shoe." She then adds a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt, revealing it was "actually my dad's sweatshirt," describing it as "super old and cozy and really worn in," and affectionately calling it "this guy." The segment maintains a casual, personal tone with playful gestures and split-screen views.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment begins with Kendall Jenner showcasing a sleek, form-fitting black leather mini dress paired with sheer black tights and red pointed-toe heels, holding a vibrant red Bottega bag. She stands in a bright, stylish room with a clothing rack, bookshelves, and a full-length mirror, describing the outfit as ideal for a night out or dinner, emphasizing comfort and confidence. On-screen text labels the key pieces: 'Little Black Dress,' 'Semi Sheers,' 'Fun Bag,' and 'Croc Mules.' The scene transitions with a 'SUNDAY' title card, and Kendall changes into a black workout bodysuit with white socks and white sneakers, revealing it’s her workout day. She explains her morning routine, mentioning she’s going for a Pilates class. She then adds a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt, which she notes was her dad’s, describing it as cozy and worn-in. The split-screen format highlights her outfit changes, with close-ups of the sweatshirt and her playful gestures, maintaining a casual, personal tone throughout.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with Kendall Jenner in a bright, stylish room with bookshelves and a clothing rack, dressed in a casual ensemble. She wears a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt, which on-screen text labels 'Dad’s Fleece,' over a grey collared shirt, black shorts labeled 'Romper,' white socks, and white Adidas Samba trainers, also labeled on-screen. A light, upbeat background music plays as Kendall, speaking in a clear, conversational tone, introduces her most-used black leather tote bag. She states, "This is the bag you will see me in most in life," elaborating that she wears it "probably every single day" and it's "definitely the most worn bag that I own." She identifies the bag as being from The Row, describing it as "a good slouchy tote bag" that "goes with literally everything," while demonstrating its versatility and showing its interior. On-screen text labels the bag 'Carry All.' She then adds her signature dark sunglasses, which she introduces by saying, "Uh, lastly, my sunglasses," completing the casual, everyday look she summarizes as "my me the majority of the time." After posing confidently, she transitions into a new, more relaxed aesthetic, appearing barefoot in a flowing, light grey sleeveless maxi dress. The scene concludes with a quick cut to production credits, listing roles like Producer, Camera Operators, and Gaffer, before fading to black, as Kendall thanks Vogue and encourages viewers to subscribe.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment begins with Kendall Jenner in a bright, stylish room with bookshelves and a clothing rack, wearing a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt over a grey collared shirt, black shorts, white socks, and white Adidas Samba trainers. She introduces her most-used black leather tote bag, describing it as a 'good slouchy tote bag' from The Row that goes with everything. She demonstrates its versatility by adjusting it on her shoulder and showing its interior. She then adds her signature dark sunglasses, labeled 'Kendall’s Sunglasses,' completing the casual, everyday look. On-screen text labels the full outfit: 'Carry All' (the tote), 'Dad’s Fleece' (the sweatshirt), 'Romper' (the shorts), and 'Adidas Samba Trainers.' After posing confidently, she transitions into a new look: a flowing, light grey sleeveless maxi dress, barefoot, suggesting a more relaxed or evening aesthetic. The scene ends with a quick cut to the production credits, listing roles like Producer, Camera Operators, and Gaffer, before fading to black.

It is carried on her shoulder and shown in close-up, with a simple, versatile design.

segments.integrated_caption: The video segment transitions from a series of production credits to a final brand reveal. Initially, the screen displays a clean, minimalist white background with black text listing various crew members and their roles, including Otto Gaiser (Key Grip), David Lowrey Jr (Sound Recordist), Dani Michelle (Wardrobe Stylist), Maren Taylor (Wardrobe Assistant), Mary Phillips (Makeup Artist), and Jen Atkin (Hair Stylist). This is followed by additional credits for Simone Moscovitch (Set Designer), Sierra Fotouhi (Set Design Assistant), Darnell Depradine (Editor), and Jasjeet Singh (Localisation Editor). The next frame lists production management roles: Katie Haworth (Production Assistant), Francesca Hartley (Production Coordinator), Benjamin Whitley (Producer, Local Language), and Nikki Hopkins (Production Manager). The final credit frame features Tom Sandford (Senior Lead, Central Productions), Michael Gora (VP, Production Operations, Digital Video, Local Language), Ezzie Chidi-Ofong (SVP, Digital Video, Local Language), and Peerspace (Location). Throughout these credit displays, a light, upbeat instrumental background music with a consistent rhythm and melody is heard, creating a pleasant and unobtrusive atmosphere. The segment concludes with the iconic 'VOGUE' logo centered on the screen, presented in a bold, classic serif font against the same white background, signaling the end of the production credits and the brand’s association with the content, with the gentle background music continuing to play alongside the logo.

entity_library.Sunday Best black tee: A simple, fitted black t-shirt worn as the base layer of the outfit, identified by Kendall as 'a little black tee by Sunday's Best'.
entity_library.Khaite sleeveless red sweater: A vibrant red, sleeveless sweater draped over the shoulders, identified by Kendall as from 'Kate' (Khaite), which she loves for its 'pop of red' and as a versatile layering piece to 'warm myself back up'.
entity_library.High-waisted black jeans: Long, slim-fit black jeans with a high waist, identified by Kendall as from 'Kate' (Khaite) and praised as her 'most favorite jeans ever' for their 'best fit and super long' length, noting their 'perfect high waist, mid-waist spot'.
entity_library.Brown loafers: Comfortable, almost-brown leather loafers worn with the outfit, noted by Kendall's voice as 'super comfortable' and suitable for wearing 'everywhere.'
entity_library.Vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress: A form-fitting, sleeveless beige dress worn for a more formal Fashion Week look, described by Kendall's voice as 'very comfortable and stretchy,' perfect for 'getting in and out of buildings and cars' and making her feel 'really good' and 'not constrained.'
entity_library.Black Gucci boots: Pointed-toe, mid-calf black leather boots with ankle ties, praised by Kendall as a beloved item she wears 'all the time' due to their comfort and stylish appearance.
